units.description: Input precondition: every interval satisfies start < stop. (V001 baseline.)
Feasibility: the returned count is witnessed by some subset of the input that is pairwise non-overlapping. (V001 baseline.)
common_failure_modes: confusing index selections with value selections

units.description: Optimality: no pairwise non-overlapping subset of the input is strictly larger than the returned count. (V001 baseline.)
common_failure_modes: stating only feasibility (admits the trivial return 0)

units.description: Endpoint convention: two intervals that share only an endpoint are non-overlapping. (V001 baseline.)
common_failure_modes: using strict inequality instead of non-strict at the boundary

units.description: Empty input: the result is 0 when the input is empty. (V001 baseline.)
